violations.description: Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. -Found both men's and women's ventilation systems in need of cleaning.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Foil covered tray and boxed product in freezer was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Throughout establishment.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors in kitchen were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop was found stored in the mop bucket
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
